info.title: Google Ads Service
info.description: Wraps the Google Ads API (v23) for MCC agency management. Handles OAuth, account linking, campaign CRUD, and performance reporting.

RunId.name: x-run-id
RunId.description: Caller's run ID from runs-service (used as parentRunId when creating a child run)

FeatureSlug.name: x-feature-slug
FeatureSlug.description: Feature slug for tracking which feature triggered the request

BrandId.name: x-brand-id
BrandId.description: Comma-separated list of brand UUIDs (e.g. "uuid1,uuid2,uuid3"). Forwarded to all downstream service calls.

post.summary: Transfer brand between orgs (no-op for google-service)
post.description: Called by brand-service during brand transfer orchestration. Google Ads accounts are org-level OAuth connections with no brand_id column, so this endpoint is a no-op that returns an empty updatedTables array.

get.summary: Generate Google OAuth2 URL for Google Ads scope
OAuth2 callback — exchanges code for refresh token and links accounts
List linked Google Ads accounts for an org
List campaigns for a Google Ads account
Get campaign performance metrics (impressions, clicks, conversions, CPA, ROAS)

post.summary: Duplicate a campaign for A/B testing

get.summary: List conversion actions for an account

post.description: Performs a web search using the Serper.dev API and returns organic results from Google's index.

post.summary: News search via Serper.dev (Google News index)
post.description: Performs a news search using the Serper.dev API and returns news results from Google's index.

post.summary: Batch search — multiple queries in one call
post.description: Performs multiple web and/or news searches in parallel and returns all results.
